description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, light brown roof featuring two skylights and a rooftop utility structure. The exterior walls are dark gray, and large glass windows dominate one side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front entrance is partially obscured by dense, well-maintained trees and shrubbery, which line the walkway and add privacy. The property is bordered by a paved driveway and a sidewalk, suggesting an urban or suburban setting. The landscaping is lush, with green grass and mature trees surrounding the building on three sides. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and lush landscaping, surrounded by trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance partially hidden by dense trees and a paved walkway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof with skylights and the large glass windows along the right facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, rooftop features, and a more open view of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with thick tree coverage and a clear look at the solid, windowless wall section.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped side windows
